## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `cd web && pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, databases, or build artifacts committed
- [ ] PR is focused on a single logical change
